description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle featuring a two-tone color scheme with tan and black components. The rifle has a collapsible stock, a pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine, all designed for ergonomic handling and rapid reloading. The upper receiver is equipped with a rail system for mounting optics or accessories, and the rifle is fitted with flip-up iron sights. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a flash hider, and the handguard has multiple attachment points for tactical accessories. The overall design suggests a lightweight, modular firearm suitable for urban environments and close-quarters engagements.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a tan and black finish, collapsible stock, detachable magazine, and rail-mounted flip-up sights.
description_view_0: Angled side view showing the collapsible stock, pistol grip, magazine, and full length of the barrel with flash hider.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rail system, handguard, and alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite angled side view, again showing the collapsible stock, magazine, and barrel, with more detail on the ejection port side.
description_view_3: Front-on view focusing on the muzzle, flash hider, and the alignment of the handguard and barrel.
